stages.concept:
# Unit 118: 수동태의 부정문과 의문문 / 조동사의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **수동태의 부정문, 의문문, 조동사 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **수동태 부정문**: be + **not** + p.p.

> The door **is not locked**.
> 문이 잠겨 있지 않다.

> The homework **was not finished** yesterday.
> 숙제가 어제 끝나지 않았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **수동태 의문문**: **Be동사** + 주어 + p.p. ~?

> **Was** the letter **written** by her?
> 그 편지는 그녀에 의해 쓰여졌니?

> **Is** English **spoken** in this country?
> 이 나라에서 영어가 사용되나요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **조동사 + 수동태**: 조동사 + **be + p.p.**

> The work **can be done** easily.
> 그 일은 쉽게 될 수 있다.

> The rule **must be followed** by everyone.
> 그 규칙은 모든 사람에 의해 지켜져야 한다.

> The package **will be delivered** tomorrow.
> 그 소포는 내일 배달될 것이다.

> This problem **should be solved** soon.
> 이 문제는 곧 해결되어야 한다.

**Q. 다음 능동태 문장을 수동태 부문정으로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르세요.**
"He didn't make the box."
1. The box didn't be made by him.
2. The box wasn't made by him. ✅
3. The box wasn't make by him.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 수동태 부정문은 `be동사 + not + p.p.` 순서랍니다. 능동태가 과거 시제(didn't)였으므로 be동사의 과거형에 not을 붙인 `was not(wasn't) made`가 정답이에요. 

🧑‍🎓 학생: 부정은 be not p.p., 의문은 Be + 주어 + p.p.?, 조동사는 조동사 + be + p.p.! 간단하네요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 118: 수동태의 부정문과 의문문, 조동사의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
(     ) the chair designed by him?
보기: Was / Were
> **정답** Was

---

**02.** The door ? not opened by her.
> **정답** was

---

**03.** The work ? be done by tomorrow.
> **정답** must (should)

---

**04.** ? English spoken here?
> **정답** Is

---

**05.** This problem ? be solved easily.
> **정답** can

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The cake was not make by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** make → made

---

**07.** Did the letter written by him?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Did → Was

---

**08.** The homework must finished by tonight.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** must finished → must be finished

---

**09.** Was the window break by the boy?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** break → broken

---

**10.** The problem can solved by anyone.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** can solved → can be solved

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
이 문제는 쉽게 풀릴 수 있다.
This problem easily.
> **정답** can be solved

---

**12.** 그 편지는 그에 의해 쓰여지지 않았다.
The letter by him.
> **정답** was not written

---

**13.** 이 일은 내일까지 끝나야 한다.
This work by tomorrow.
> **정답** must be finished

---

**14.** 이 제품은 여기서 만들어지는 건가요?
this product here?
> **정답** Is, made

---

**15.** 그 규칙은 지켜져야 한다.
The rules .
> **정답** should be followed

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이 문제는 풀릴 수 있다.
can This problem be solved
> **정답** This / problem / can / be / solved

---

**17.** 그 문은 열리지 않았다.
The door not was opened
> **정답** The / door / was / not / opened

---

**18.** 그 책은 그녀에 의해 쓰여졌니?
Was the book by written her
> **정답** Was / the / book / written / by / her

---

**19.** 숙제는 오늘까지 끝내야 한다.
The homework must finished be by today
> **정답** The / homework / must / be / finished / by / today

---

**20.** 여기서는 영어가 사용됩니까?
Is spoken English here
> **정답** Is / English / spoken / here
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 118: 수동태의 부정문과 의문문  조동사의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
Amy gave us a suggestion.
A suggestion was given __________ us by Amy.
to
of
for
with
> **정답** to

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
She bought me a book.
A book was bought __________ me by her.
to
of
at
for
> **정답** for

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
전치사를 고르시오.
She asked the member his name.
His name was asked __________ the member by her.
for
with
of
to
> **정답** of

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
전치사를 고르시오.
Tom taught my children English.
English was taught _________ my children by Tom.
from
to
for
of
> **정답** to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
My father made me a chair.
A chair was made to me by my father.
I was made a chair by my father
A chair was made for me by my father.
A chair is made for me by my father.
> **정답** A chair was made for me by my father.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Amy wrote them a letter.
A letter was written of them by Tom.
They were written to a letter by Amy.
A letter was written for them by Amy.
A letter was written to them by Amy.
> **정답** A letter was written to them by Amy.

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He gave me a birthday present.
I was given a birthday present by him
I was given him a birthday present.
A birthday present was given to me by him.
He was given a birthday present by me.
> **정답** I was given a birthday present by him, A birthday present was given to me by him.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
Amy는 나에게 새 가방을 만들어 주었다.
I was made for the new bag by Amy.
The new bag was made for me by Amy.
The new bag was made to me by Amy.
The new bag was made of me by Amy.
> **정답** The new bag was made for me by Amy.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그녀에게 내 자전거를 팔았다.
She was sold to my bike by me.
My bike was sold of her by me.
My bike was sold to her by me.
My bike was sold for her by me.
> **정답** My bike was sold to her by me.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
A present was given to me by her.
The meal is cooked to us by my mom.
He was taught music by the professor.
The movie is shown to me by my friend.
> **정답** The meal is cooked to us by my mom.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I was given to a present by her.
The books were sold to me by the seller.
The car was bought for me by her.
The money was paid to me by him.
> **정답** I was given to a present by her.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I showed the police my driver's license.
The police showed me my driver's license.
My driver's license was shown for the police
by me.
My driver's license was shown to the police by
me.
The police was shown my driver's license by
me.
• driver's license 운전면허증
> **정답** My driver's license was shown to the police by me., The police was shown my driver's license by me.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Dinner is cooked of me by mom.
The smartphone was found by her.
The computer was bought for me by her.
Hobbies were asked of him by the interviewer.
> **정답** Dinner is cooked of me by mom.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
단어를 쓰시오.
He wrote his daughter a long story.
A long story ___________ his daughter by him.
was written for
was written of
was written
was written to
> **정답** was written to

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은
단어를 쓰시오.
Tom gets me some cookies
Some cookies __________ me by Tom.
are gotten for
are gotten of
are gotten to
were gotten for
> **정답** are gotten for

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 카메라는 나에 의해 그에게 팔렸다.
The camera __________ him by me.
was sold of
is sold
was sold by
was sold to
> **정답** was sold to

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The password is asked me by
her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** me → of me

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The house was bought to her
daughter by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to → for

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The candies are given for
children by her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
Tom won first prize in the competition yesterday.
He gave a gold medal. He
was celebrated by a lot of people. Many
bouquets were handed for him
by them.
• bouquet 부케, 꽃다발
> **정답** was given, was celebrated, were handed to
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 118 수동태의 부정문과 의문문  조동사의 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오. (축약형으로)
Horses didn't pull the heavy luggage carts.
The heavy luggage carts  (     )   (     )  
horses.
• pull 끌다
• luggage cart 짐수레
정답 weren't, pulled, by

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
He can manage the complaint.
The complaint  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
• manage 다루다
• complaint 불평, 항의
정답 can, be, managed, by, him

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
Do you make this program?
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  you?
정답 Is, this, program, made, by

---

**04.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 넣어 문장을
완성하시오.
A: Why  (     )  this statue  (     ) (     )
B: This was broken by the flood.
• statue 조각상
• flood 홍수
정답 was, broken

---

**05.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: Did you call her yesterday?
B: No, I was busy. A lot of work [be]   (     )  
. [not, do]
정답 was, not, done

---

**06.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
My brother doesn't repair a car.
A car  (     )   (     )   (     )  my brother.
정답 isn't, repaired, by

---

**07.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
People should not enter the lawn.
The lawn should  (     )   (     )   (     )  
people.
• lawn 잔디
정답 not, be, entered, by

---

**08.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
Did he write his name under the picture?
 his name  (     )  under the picture by him?
정답 Was, written

---

**09.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A: Whose bag is this?
B: The bag [be]   (     )   (     )  Amy yesterday.
[lose]
It must be Amy's.
정답 was, lost, by

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오. (과거시제)
I [drop]  my cell phone on the street yesterday.
The cell phone [break] (     ) . I visited the
service center right away. My cell phone
[check] (     )  by a repairman. He told me it
would take a week] to fix it.
정답 dropped, was broken, was checked

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 118: 수동태의 부정문과 의문문 / 조동사의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom gave us a hint.
A hint was given __________ us by Tom. to of for with
> 정답: to

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He bought me a jacket.
A jacket was bought __________ me by him. to of at for
> 정답: for

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
He asked the student his address.
His address was asked __________ the student by him. for with of to
> 정답: of

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 만들 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
Amy taught my brother Korean.
Korean was taught _________ my brother by Amy. from to for of
> 정답: to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
My mother made me a scarf.
A scarf was made to me by my mother.
I was made a scarf by my mother.
A scarf was made for me by my mother.
A scarf is made for me by my mother.
> 정답: A scarf was made for me by my mother.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Tom wrote them an email.
An email was written of them by Tom.
They were written to an email by Tom.
An email was written for them by Tom.
An email was written to them by Tom.
> 정답: An email was written to them by Tom.

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She gave me a thank-you card.
I was given a thank-you card by her.
I was given her a thank-you card.
A thank-you card was given to me by her.
She was given a thank-you card by me.
> 정답: I was given a birthday present by him, A birthday present was given to me by him.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 나에게 새 지갑을 만들어 주었다.
I was made for the new wallet by Amy.
The new wallet was made for me by Amy.
The new wallet was made to me by Amy.
The new wallet was made of me by Amy.
> 정답: The new wallet was made for me by Amy.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그에게 내 카메라를 팔았다.
He was sold to my camera by me.
My camera was sold of him by me.
My camera was sold to him by me.
My camera was sold for him by me.
> 정답: My camera was sold to him by me.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
A gift was given to me by him.
The soup is cooked to us by my dad.
She was taught piano by the instructor.
The video is shown to me by my classmate.
> 정답: The soup is cooked to us by my dad.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I was given to a gift by him.
The toys were sold to me by the clerk.
The phone was bought for me by him.
The fee was paid to me by her.
> 정답: I was given to a gift by him.

---

**12.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I showed the guard my ID card.
The guard showed me my ID card.
My ID card was shown for the guard by me.
My ID card was shown to the guard by me.
The guard was shown my ID card by me.
> 정답: My ID card was shown to the guard by me., The police was shown my driver's license by me.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Lunch is cooked of me by dad.
The wallet was found by him.
The tablet was bought for me by him.
Plans were asked of her by the manager.
> 정답: Lunch is cooked of me by dad.

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
She wrote her son a long letter.
A long letter ___________ her son by her. was written for was written of was written was written to
> 정답: was written to

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고칠 때 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
Amy gets me some snacks.
Some snacks __________ me by Amy. are gotten for are gotten of are gotten to were gotten for
> 정답: are gotten for

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 자전거는 나에 의해 그녀에게 팔렸다.
The bicycle __________ her by me. was sold of is sold was sold by was sold to
> 정답: was sold to

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  answer  is  asked  me  by him. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: me → of me

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  laptop  was  bought  to  her son  by  her. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to → for

---
